blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 32 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 46°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 46°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Wednesday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
